title: pellaea hirsuta
intro: Pellaea hirsuta, also known as the hairy alpine fern or woolly maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Pellaea hirsuta are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Pellaea hirsuta can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes.
